meta.title: Setup / Changeover Time
meta.description: A single processor with a sequence-dependent setup (changeover). The source emits two alternating product types (type_count=2), so every job differs from the previous one and incurs a setup before processing. The processor is kept saturated by a fast source. Effective capacity drops from 1/process_time to 1/(process_time+setup_time).

expected.formula: with a changeover on every job: capacity = 1/(process_time+setup_time) = 1/7 ~ 0.1429; without changeover: 1/5 = 0.2
